name: Kaiser Rolls
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons barley malt syrup, in health food store
recipeInstructions:
1. ADD ALL INGREDIENTS ACCORDING TO BREAD MACHINE MANUAL, EXCEPT FOR POPPY SEED.
2. WHEN THE DOUGH CYCLE ENDS, REMOVE THE DOUGH AND DIVIDE IT INTO 8 PIECES.
3. ROLL EACH PIECE INTO A BALL AND SPRINKLE WITH POPPY SEED. PLACE THEM SEED SIDE UP ON A BAKING SHEET.
4. USE A SHARP KNIFE OR PAINTER'S LAME TO SCORE 3 SEMICIRCLES FROM THE CENTER OF EACH PIECE.
5. LET THE ROLLS RAISE FOR 30 MINUTES OR UNTIL DUBLED IN SIZE.
6. PREHEAT THE OVEN TO 375°F (190°C).
7. PLACE THE ROLLS IN THE PREHEATED OVEN AND BAKE FOR 15 MINUTES OR UNTILL GOLDEN BRONWN.
